title: Create: Oxidized
description: Allows copper blocks to oxidize by washing them!
body:
# THIS DATAPACK IS FOR USE WITH THE CREATE MOD

This datapack simply allows you to oxidize your copper blocks, stairs, and slabs by washing them.

You can only wash copper blocks that are not waxed.
